name: Talk with Doc Epoch
description: Find Doc Epoch and talk to him to start your journey into machine learning.

name: Talk with Lady Rate
description: Lady Rate will help you understand how to choose the right learning rate for your model.

name: Talk with Master Bias
description: Master Bias will explain how bias helps the model make better predictions.

name: Talk with the Overfitting Monster
description: The Overfitting Monster threatens your model! Learn how to avoid overfitting.

name: Machine Learning Master
description: You have completed all the lessons! Now you are ready to train your model.
